content.text: Earlier turn: please prepare the intake workflow and remember that the final answer should be concise.
Earlier turn acknowledged. I can answer readiness checks without calling tools.
Second earlier turn: the schemas include email, UUID, and ISO-date constraints.
Second earlier turn acknowledged. I will avoid tools unless they are required.
Readiness check only. Reply with exactly READY.

tools.name: collectProfile1
tools.description: Collect and normalize profile 1. The fields intentionally use zod v4 string-format validators that emit JSON Schema pattern keywords.

email.description: A deliverable contact email address for the profile.

kidId.description: A stable UUID for the child or dependent profile.

birthDate.description: An ISO calendar date of birth.

guardianEmail.description: A backup email address for the guardian.

householdId.description: A stable UUID for the household.

note.description: A short plain-English note about the profile.
